title: CAST from DOUBLE to INTEGER sometimes returns 1, sometimes 2
poc: select cast(cast(1.9 as double) as signed) ;
select cast(a as signed) from k;
select cast(1.9e0 as signed) from k;
select cast(y as signed) from (select cast(1.9 as double)) as der(y);
select cast(1.9 as signed) from k;
select cast(cast(1.9 as double) as signed) = cast(1.9e0 as signed) ;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent CAST from DOUBLE to INTEGER
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_double(a DOUBLE, b INT);
SELECT CAST(a AS SIGNED) FROM test_double;
SELECT CAST(CAST(a AS DOUBLE) AS SIGNED) FROM test_double;
SELECT CAST(1.9e0 AS SIGNED) FROM test_double;
